question.content: For the overhanging beam shown, two concentrated loads F_1 = F and F_2 = F act on the beam. F_1 may act only on the overhang (0 <= x_1 <= l/4), while F_2 may move between the supports (0 <= x_2 <= l). Require that, for any position of F_2 between the supports, the bending moment of the beam does not exceed the allowable moment [M]. Determine only the maximum common load F_max. Answer format: a single symbol or algebraic expression for F_max; write only the result, with no explanatory text or equals sign.

step_1.content: Construct moment envelopes for overhang plus span under two movable concentrated loads.
step_1.key_point: Worst-case moment must stay within allowable [M].

step_3.content: Optimize x1 location to maximize admissible common load F.
